title: Java Collections List
description: Practice imports, List.of, ArrayList, add, get, and size.

completionChecks.explanation: List.of seeds the ArrayList with Ada and Grace, add appends Linus at the end, so get(0) is still Ada and size() is 3.

completionChecks.prompt: What happens if names is assigned List.of("Ada", "Grace") directly and then names.add("Linus") runs?
choices: The add call is ignored silently
Compilation fails because List.of is not a List
It throws UnsupportedOperationException because List.of is immutable
completionChecks.explanation: List.of returns an unmodifiable list, so add throws UnsupportedOperationException; the lesson copies it into a new ArrayList precisely so it can be modified.

completionChecks.prompt: After the target code runs, what does System.out.println(names.get(2)) print?
completionChecks.explanation: List indexes are zero-based, so after adding Linus at the end, index 2 refers to the third element.
